title: Universal Gate Implementation of Logic Functions
description: A diagram showing how NAND and NOR gates, as universal gates, can be used to construct the fundamental logic operations (NOT, AND, OR).
relationships: NAND gate with both inputs tied together creates a NOT function
NAND gate followed by a NAND-based NOT creates an AND function
Two NAND gates can be combined to create an OR function
NOR gate with both inputs tied together creates a NOT function
NOR gate followed by a NOR-based NOT creates an OR function
Two NOR gates can be combined to create an AND function
